ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas.

Ms. Alavi addressed the examiner's notes stating that in regards to legal research it is part of their training, that there are certain cases where the situation is out of the ordinary, that this matter was very contentious, that the family was living in the property and then submitted a huge claim for reimbursement, that based on research they did not pay the claim which was a savings to the trust, that in regards to the paralegal's time she went through the entries and that they were not administrative, that if they have the secretary prepare and send the notices it requires the attorney to review it, that involved in the entry to check the tentative ruling was a discussion with counsel regarding the hearing, that regarding the time entries for communication with Sandra Smith there were lots of issues with financing and that it could not have been done without those communications. The Court asked for a time frame for the distribution of the reserve and Ms. Alavi requested 3 years. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
